text: The CEO acknowledged a real harm publicly and named the specific people who had been affected.
I have seen managers handle equity beautifully and other managers treat it as a tax on their schedule.
An employee resource group I helped lead was quietly defunded after we asked for executive sponsorship. That is my honest read.
There were genuine moments of accountability and other moments where the same complaints from last year came back unaddressed.
